name: Rich Chocolate Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract.
2. Add the melted butter; mix well.
3. Combine the dry ingredients (flour, cocoa, baking powder, salt); add to the batter and mix thoroughly.
4. Pour into a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 25-30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool in the pan on a wire rack.
7. For frosting, combine butter, cocoa, water, and coffee; mix well.
8. Gradually stir in sugar until smooth, adding additional warm water if necessary to achieve a spreading consistency.
9. Frost the brownies.
